news.title:
EID Parry to invest Rs. 610 cr in equity and Rs. 130 cr in loans.
Funds will support PSRIPL's operations and address structural, financial challenges.
news.summary:
EID Parry to invest Rs. 610 cr in equity and Rs. 130 cr in loans.
Funds will support PSRIPL's operations and address structural, financial challenges.

news.title:
EID Parry to close sugar refinery unit by Mar 31, 2026 due to Rs.1406 Cr losses.
Company to invest Rs.610 Cr, provide Rs.130 Cr loans, settle Rs.137 Cr loans.
news.summary:
EID Parry to close sugar refinery unit by Mar 31, 2026 due to Rs.1406 Cr losses.
Company to invest Rs.610 Cr, provide Rs.130 Cr loans, settle Rs.137 Cr loans.

news.title:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.
news.summary:
Balkrishna Ind. saw volumes surge 43.9x to 3.05L shares, stock down 2.3% at Rs.2459. Eternal Ltd surged 29.5x to 1035.22L shares, up 1.5% at Rs.254.
Tejas Networks rose 8.4% to Rs.344.65 with 25.8x volume increase. EID Parry gained 0.6% at Rs.871, Angel One dropped 1.9% to Rs.244.30, both with volume spikes.

news.title:
Global sugar market forecasts 3.5 MMT surplus for 2025-26. Indian sugar output pegged at 34.3 MMT with 6 MMT closing stock.
EID Parry crushed 15.31 LMT sugarcane, 11.2% recovery, 1.39 LMT sugar. Consumer revenue dropped to INR143 Cr from INR236 Cr.
news.summary:
Global sugar market forecasts 3.5 MMT surplus for 2025-26. Indian sugar output pegged at 34.3 MMT with 6 MMT closing stock.
EID Parry crushed 15.31 LMT sugarcane, 11.2% recovery, 1.39 LMT sugar. Consumer revenue dropped to INR143 Cr from INR236 Cr.

news.title:
EID Parry India shared the audio recording link of the investor call discussing Q3 FY26 results.
The conference call was held on February 13, 2026, at 10:30 am for analysts and investors.
news.summary:
EID Parry India shared the audio recording link of the investor call discussing Q3 FY26 results.
The conference call was held on February 13, 2026, at 10:30 am for analysts and investors.

news.title:
EID Parry India reports Rs.10,316 Cr revenue with 9% EBITDA growth.
The company plans a shift in its CPG product mix.
news.summary:
EID Parry India reports Rs.10,316 Cr revenue with 9% EBITDA growth.
The company plans a shift in its CPG product mix.

news.title:
EID Parry's board approved Algavista Greentech's request for declassification from Promoter Group under SEBI Regulation 31A.
Application for No Objection Certificate is underway; Algavista agrees to comply with SEBI requirements.
news.summary:
EID Parry's board approved Algavista Greentech's request for declassification from Promoter Group under SEBI Regulation 31A.
Application for No Objection Certificate is underway; Algavista agrees to comply with SEBI requirements.

news.title:
EID Parry to sell up to 15M shares of Coromandel Intl, 0.51% of equity.
Current holding in Coromandel Intl is 56.1%; sale via open market at market price.
news.summary:
EID Parry to sell up to 15M shares of Coromandel Intl, 0.51% of equity.
Current holding in Coromandel Intl is 56.1%; sale via open market at market price.

news.title:
EID Parry India Ltd reported Q3 FY26 standalone loss of Rs 54.35 crore but consolidated profit of Rs 437 crore.
Board approved an interim dividend and plans to sell 15 lakh shares of its subsidiary.
news.summary:
EID Parry India Ltd reported Q3 FY26 standalone loss of Rs 54.35 crore but consolidated profit of Rs 437 crore.
Board approved an interim dividend and plans to sell 15 lakh shares of its subsidiary.

news.title:
EID Parry India Ltd schedules an investor call on Feb 13, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The call will feature management speakers and is open to all investors, analysts, and financial institutions.
news.summary:
EID Parry India Ltd schedules an investor call on Feb 13, 2026, to discuss Q3 FY26 results.
The call will feature management speakers and is open to all investors, analysts, and financial institutions.

news.title:
E.I.D. Parry executed a Rs. 26.2 crore NSE block trade for ~260,552 shares.
Shares were traded at Rs. 1005.1 each in this significant transaction.
news.summary:
E.I.D. Parry executed a Rs. 26.2 crore NSE block trade for ~260,552 shares.
Shares were traded at Rs. 1005.1 each in this significant transaction.

news.title:
Algavista Greentech seeks reclassification from promoter to public after EID Parry's 50% stake sale.
Algavista holds no shares post-sale; reclassification needs Board and stock exchange approvals.
news.summary:
Algavista Greentech seeks reclassification from promoter to public after EID Parry's 50% stake sale.
Algavista holds no shares post-sale; reclassification needs Board and stock exchange approvals.

news.title:
EID Parry India Ltd received a request from Algavista Greentech Pvt Ltd for declassification from the promoter group.
The declassification request follows the complete sale of EID's 50% stake in Algavista to Synthite Industries; Algavista now holds no shares in EID.
news.summary:
EID Parry India Ltd received a request from Algavista Greentech Pvt Ltd for declassification from the promoter group.
The declassification request follows the complete sale of EID's 50% stake in Algavista to Synthite Industries; Algavista now holds no shares in EID.

news.title:
EID Parry's metrics revised due to sector dynamics and financial trends.
Updates reflect changes in valuation, financials, and technical outlook.
news.summary:
EID Parry's metrics revised due to sector dynamics and financial trends.

news.title:
EID Parry shares fell 2.3% on 8 Dec, closing at Rs 1,009.
The drop reflects short-term sector pressures despite strong fundamentals and long-term returns.
news.summary:
EID Parry shares fell 2.3% on 8 Dec, closing at Rs 1,009.

news.title:
EID Parry's sugar production declined YoY, prices rose to ₹41.2/kg from ₹38.5/kg.
Refinery revenue increased, EBITDA doubled to ₹58 cr from ₹29 cr YoY.
news.summary:
EID Parry's sugar production declined YoY, prices rose to ₹41.2/kg from ₹38.5/kg.
Refinery revenue increased, EBITDA doubled to ₹58 cr from ₹29 cr YoY.

news.title:
EID Parry India Ltd reports 27% revenue growth in H1 FY26.
Company expands focus on Food, Nutrition, and Bioenergy with FMCG initiatives.
news.summary:

EID Parry India reports Q2 consolidated net profit of 4.24B INR, up from 3.05B YoY.
The company marked significant profit growth compared to the same quarter last year.
